_meta.instrument: Open Extended Jungian Type Scales (OEJTS 1.2), Eric Jorgenson
_meta.full_name: Open Extended Jungian Type Scales (OEJTS 1.2), Eric Jorgenson
_meta.attribution: Open Extended Jungian Type Scales (OEJTS 1.2), Eric Jorgenson via openpsychometrics.org. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (attribution + non-commercial + share-alike).
_meta.cautions: REFERENCE ONLY. The OEJTS *items* are CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (only openpsychometrics' raw response DATASETS are public domain, NOT the items). NonCommercial + ShareAlike make these UNSAFE to reproduce or rewrite in a commercial product without permission. Kept here for study of a directly-MBTI-mapped bipolar item design. For commercial authoring, base work on the public-domain IPIP set instead. | Design: 32 bipolar 5-point items; 8 per dichotomy; scored by summing per-dichotomy equations against thresholds.

verification.summary: adversarially fact-checked by a second agent against primary sources (deepinme research workflow, 2026-07) — 32/32 items match official PDF; licence corrected from the task's public-domain premise to CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

items.text: makes lists ↔ relies on memory
items.keyed: Q1, + in JP equation: left 'makes lists' = J, right 'relies on memory' = P

items.text: sceptical ↔ wants to believe
items.keyed: Q2, − in FT equation: left 'sceptical' = T, right 'wants to believe' = F

items.text: bored by time alone ↔ needs time alone
items.keyed: Q3, − in IE equation: left 'bored by time alone' = E, right 'needs time alone' = I

items.text: accepts things as they are ↔ unsatisfied with the ways things are
items.keyed: Q4, + in SN equation: left 'accepts things as they are' = S, right 'unsatisfied with the ways things are' = N

items.text: keeps a clean room ↔ just puts stuff where ever
items.keyed: Q5, + in JP equation: left 'keeps a clean room' = J, right 'just puts stuff where ever' = P

items.text: thinks "robotic" is an insult ↔ strives to have a mechanical mind
items.keyed: Q6, + in FT equation: left 'thinks robotic is an insult' = F, right 'strives to have a mechanical mind' = T

items.text: energetic ↔ mellow
items.keyed: Q7, − in IE equation: left 'energetic' = E, right 'mellow' = I

items.text: prefer to take multiple choice test ↔ prefer essay answers
items.keyed: Q8, + in SN equation: left 'prefer multiple choice test' = S, right 'prefer essay answers' = N

items.text: chaotic ↔ organized
items.keyed: Q9, − in JP equation: left 'chaotic' = P, right 'organized' = J

items.text: easily hurt ↔ thick-skinned
items.keyed: Q10, + in FT equation: left 'easily hurt' = F, right 'thick-skinned' = T

items.text: works best in groups ↔ works best alone
items.keyed: Q11, − in IE equation: left 'works best in groups' = E, right 'works best alone' = I

items.text: focused on the present ↔ focused on the future
items.keyed: Q12, + in SN equation: left 'focused on the present' = S, right 'focused on the future' = N

items.text: plans far ahead ↔ plans at the last minute
items.keyed: Q13, + in JP equation: left 'plans far ahead' = J, right 'plans at the last minute' = P

items.text: wants people's respect ↔ wants their love
items.keyed: Q14, − in FT equation: left 'wants people's respect' = T, right 'wants their love' = F

items.text: gets worn out by parties ↔ gets fired up by parties
items.keyed: Q15, + in IE equation: left 'gets worn out by parties' = I, right 'gets fired up by parties' = E

items.text: fits in ↔ stands out
items.keyed: Q16, + in SN equation: left 'fits in' = S, right 'stands out' = N

items.text: keeps options open ↔ commits
items.keyed: Q17, − in JP equation: left 'keeps options open' = P, right 'commits' = J

items.text: wants to be good at fixing things ↔ wants to be good at fixing people
items.keyed: Q18, − in FT equation: left 'fixing things' = T, right 'fixing people' = F

items.text: talks more ↔ listens more
items.keyed: Q19, − in IE equation: left 'talks more' = E, right 'listens more' = I

items.text: when describing an event, will tell people what happened ↔ when describing an event, will tell people what it meant
items.keyed: Q20, + in SN equation: left 'tell what happened' = S, right 'tell what it meant' = N

items.text: gets work done right away ↔ procrastinates
items.keyed: Q21, + in JP equation: left 'gets work done right away' = J, right 'procrastinates' = P

items.text: follows the heart ↔ follows the head
items.keyed: Q22, + in FT equation: left 'follows the heart' = F, right 'follows the head' = T

items.text: stays at home ↔ goes out on the town
items.keyed: Q23, + in IE equation: left 'stays at home' = I, right 'goes out on the town' = E

items.text: wants the big picture ↔ wants the details
items.keyed: Q24, − in SN equation: left 'wants the big picture' = N, right 'wants the details' = S

items.text: improvises ↔ prepares
items.keyed: Q25, − in JP equation: left 'improvises' = P, right 'prepares' = J

items.text: bases morality on justice ↔ bases morality on compassion
items.keyed: Q26, − in FT equation: left 'bases morality on justice' = T, right 'bases morality on compassion' = F

items.text: finds it difficult to yell very loudly ↔ yelling to others when they are far away comes naturally
items.keyed: Q27, + in IE equation: left 'finds it difficult to yell' = I, right 'yelling comes naturally' = E

items.text: theoretical ↔ empirical
items.keyed: Q28, − in SN equation: left 'theoretical' = N, right 'empirical' = S

items.text: works hard ↔ plays hard
items.keyed: Q29, + in JP equation: left 'works hard' = J, right 'plays hard' = P

items.text: uncomfortable with emotions ↔ values emotions
items.keyed: Q30, − in FT equation: left 'uncomfortable with emotions' = T, right 'values emotions' = F

items.text: likes to perform in front of other people ↔ avoids public speaking
items.keyed: Q31, − in IE equation: left 'likes to perform' = E, right 'avoids public speaking' = I

items.text: likes to know "who?", "what?", "when?" ↔ likes to know "why?"
items.keyed: Q32, + in SN equation: left 'likes to know who/what/when' = S, right 'likes to know why' = N
